DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.q: 75. The word "<u>vary</u>" in paragraph 2 means ______
DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.explanation:
Doğru Cevap: c. change
Bu bir kelime anlama (Vocabulary in context) sorusudur. 2. paragrafın son cümlesinde 'Grade levels in each vary from area to area.' denmektedir. Cümlenin anlamı 'Her birindeki sınıf seviyeleri bölgeden bölgeye değişiklik gösterir / farklılaşır' şeklindedir. İngilizcede 'vary' kelimesinin en yaygın ve tam karşılığı 'change' (değişmek) fiilidir.

DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.context:
TEXT III
Few hobbies combine collecting Roman artefacts, medieval coins, and discovering bodies. However, the very British hobby of mudlarking is making a comeback. Mudlarking is a pastime that has become more popular in the last few years in London. It involves going to the River Thames at low tide and digging in the mud for valuable objects. A person who goes mudlarking is called a mudlark.

Mudlarking has its origins in 18th-Century London. But in those days, it wasn't a hobby at all. It was actually a way for many children - and those too old to be employed - to survive. This was at a time when there were hardly any bridges crossing the river, so most people caught boats across. Getting on and off the boats, people dropped things. These were then found by mudlarks, the poorest level of society, who sold them to earn money, which would hopefully be just enough for a meal.

Steve Brooker is a modern-day mudlark and he's had this unusual hobby for 30 years. He's found everything from glass bottles and clay pots, to coins dating from Roman times right up to the present day. He says he has found many extraordinary things, but finding a human skeleton was particularly terrifying. He later found out the bones were 300 years old, but even so, it's an experience he is happy he hasn't repeated. Steve often goes to the river near where he lives, but on the day I met him, he accompanied me in my boat to the east of the city. Steve was excited because he hadn't had a boat for a few years, and this meant he could reach an area where he hadn't been for some time. 'Getting caught out by the tide is a real danger,' Steve explains. He advises us, as he does with anyone he has guided on the river, to watch for the water level and always have an escape route. We appear to be OK and our boat is our way on and off the Blackwall foreshore.

Apart from a permit, the only tools required for mudlarking are a bucket and something to dig with. At 25°C, we are lucky with the weather, but even on rainy days, keen mudlarks can be found by the water's edge. 'Every day, as the water level rises and falls, it moves objects in the mud,' explains Steve. 'So it's possible to find really good things any time of the year.' Steve quickly fills his bucket with coins, Victorian pipes, old keys, and even a jar that he says came from an old food factory that used to be nearby. He knows exactly where to look and hardly digs down at all. After an hour, his top object is a metal toy from the 1800s. Much of what he finds goes to local museums. 'That's what anyone who goes mudlarking usually does,' says Steve.

Steve explains why the river mud holds such treasure. 'It is anaerobic, which means it doesn't hold air. Therefore, anything in it stays in great condition,' he says. 'Once they are opened up to the air, however, their condition starts to break down, so mudlarking is all about keeping things that would otherwise fall to pieces'.
DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.q: 76. The main purpose of this reading passage is to ______
options: a. talk about various pastimes of Londoners
b. talk about the increasing popularity of mudlarking in London
c. explain why mudlarking is becoming unpopular in London
d. complain about the people who make their living by mudlarking
DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.explanation:
Doğru Cevap: b. talk about the increasing popularity of mudlarking in London
Bu bir 'Ana Fikir / Amaç' (Main Purpose) sorusudur. Metnin ilk paragrafında 'the very British hobby of mudlarking is making a comeback' (İngiliz mudlarking hobisi geri dönüş yapıyor) ve 'has become more popular in the last few years in London' (Londra'da son yıllarda daha popüler hale geldi) denmektedir. Metnin geri kalanı da tamamen bu popülerleşen hobinin tarihini ve günümüzde nasıl yapıldığını anlatmaktadır.

DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.q: 77. According to the passage, in 18th-Century London, mudlarking was ______
options: a. mainly done by the elderly
b. a popular hobby for boat owners
c. often practiced by restaurant staff
d. a way for some people to stay alive
DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.explanation:
Doğru Cevap: d. a way for some people to stay alive
Metnin ikinci paragrafında 18. yüzyılda bu işin bir hobi olmadığı, çocuklar ve yaşlılar için hayatta kalma yolu olduğu açıkça belirtilmiştir: 'It was actually a way for many children... to survive'. İngilizcede 'survive' kelimesinin tam karşılığı ve eş anlamlısı D şıkkındaki 'stay alive' (hayatta kalmak) ifadesidir.

DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.q: 78. According to the author, Steve Brooker ______
options: a. has uncovered coins used in different periods of history
b. has discovered an animal's bones while mudlarking
c. hopes to continue this hobby for many more years
d. hopes he will find more bones soon
DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.explanation:
Doğru Cevap: a. has uncovered coins used in different periods of history
Metnin üçüncü paragrafında Steve Brooker'ın buldukları sıralanırken '...to coins dating from Roman times right up to the present day' (Roma döneminden günümüze kadar uzanan madeni paralar) ifadesi geçmektedir. Bu da onun 'tarihin farklı dönemlerinde kullanılan paraları' ortaya çıkardığını kanıtlar.

• b. ...discovered an animal's bones: Metinde hayvan kemikleri değil, insan iskeleti (human skeleton) bulduğu yazar.
• d. hopes he will find more bones soon: İnsan kemiği bulma deneyimini 'tekrarlamadığı için mutlu olduğu' (happy he hasn't repeated) yazmaktadır, yani tekrar böyle bir şey bulmak istemez.

DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.q: 79. Steve advises other mudlarks to ______
options: a. buy a boat to be able to find unusual things
b. have a plan in case of an emergency
c. travel up the river whenever they want to
d. practise their hobby on all parts of the river
DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.explanation:
Doğru Cevap: b. have a plan in case of an emergency
Metnin üçüncü paragrafının sonlarında Steve, nehirden kaynaklanan gelgit tehlikesine karşı çok net bir tavsiyede bulunur: 'He advises us... to watch for the water level and always have an escape route' (su seviyesine dikkat etmemizi ve her zaman bir kaçış rotamızın olmasını tavsiye eder). Beklenmedik durumlar için 'kaçış rotası' bulundurmak, B şıkkındaki 'acil durumlar için bir plana sahip olmak' (have a plan in case of an emergency) ile tamamen aynı anlamdadır.

DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.q: 80. "<u>it</u>" in paragraph 5 refers to the ______
DEÜ Örnek Muafiyet 1.explanation:
Doğru Cevap: c. river mud
Bu bir 'Zamir / Referans' sorusudur. 5. paragrafta Steve nehir çamurunun (river mud) neden içinde harika şeyler barındırdığını açıklarken 'O anaerobiktir, yani hava barındırmaz. Bu yüzden onun (it) içindeki her şey harika durumda kalır' demektedir. Buradaki 'onun içinde' (in it) derken kast edilen ve hava almayan yer, cümlenin ana öznesi olan 'nehir çamuru'dur (river mud).
